name: Product V2 full project reset
description: Reset the current project to match Product Direction V2 across product specs, database schema, worker contracts, web UI, tests, current docs, and harness state. The reset removes the old payer/creator expense split, private/public visibility mode, household-first positioning, household-dependent groups, and lens terminology from current product behavior.

planned: Used using-skills first and classified the request as Level 3 because it spans product behavior, database schema, API contracts, frontend UX, tests, docs, and harness cleanup.
Used writing-plans and read docs/PLANS.md, docs/exec-plans/__plan-template__.md, docs/exec-plans/index.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and relevant backend/frontend/shared reference docs.
Scanned the project for stale V1 model terms and found broad references across worker, web, product specs, and harness records.
Created an ExecPlan for the full reset and registered it as the active plan.
Completed Phase 0 by running GitNexus impact checks for the first shared symbols called out in the plan.
Completed Phase 1 by rewriting current product specs and replacing the V1-heavy ownership/visibility specs.
Completed one Phase 3 milestone by removing household defaultVisibility from worker/web contracts, handlers, tests, i18n, and the base migration.
Completed one Phase 3 milestone by migrating the public expense contract to V2 across worker/web CRUD and query entry points while keeping temporary repository bridges to existing storage fields.
Completed one Phase 3 milestone by migrating the worker expense integration and scenario suites to V2 semantics and recovering a green full worker test suite.
verification: Plan artifact verification: python3 -m json.tool validated harness/feature_index.json and harness/features/feat-071.json.
Plan placeholder scan found no unfinished placeholder markers in the new plan and touched harness/index files.
Pre-edit impact checks: createExpenseHandler LOW, buildVisibleExpenseConditions LOW, ExpenseDTO MEDIUM with broad contract/import reach, buildExpenseEntryPayload LOW, OverviewPage LOW.
Phase 1 stale-term scan for docs/product-specs returned no matches for payer|creator|visibility|private|public|lens|defaultVisibility after rewrites.
Final ./init.sh returned Done! after the Phase 1 docs and harness updates.
Final gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all) returned LOW risk with 100 changed indexed sections across 19 indexed files and 0 affected processes.

Focused household slice verification passed: ./init.sh typecheck returned OK; pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/unit/dto-household.spec.ts test/integration/households-read-update.spec.ts passed with 16 tests; pnpm --filter web exec vitest run src/stores/household.store.test.ts passed with 8 tests.
Post-change stale-term scan for defaultVisibility/default_visibility returned no matches across worker/web household files and 0001_init.sql.
Post-change gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all) returned MEDIUM risk with 6 changed indexed symbols across 16 files and 3 affected household-related processes.

Expense contract milestone verification passed: ./init.sh typecheck returned OK; pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/unit/dto-expense.spec.ts test/unit/dto-expense-list.spec.ts passed with 41 tests; pnpm --filter web exec vitest run src/features/expenses/components/use-expense-entry-form.test.ts passed with 8 tests; pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/integration/expenses.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-detail-success.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-summary.spec.ts passed with 15 tests.

Worker integration migration verification passed: pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/integration/expenses-list-personal-feed.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-list-personal-visibility.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-list-household.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-list-household-member.spec.ts passed with 13 tests; pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/integration/expenses-update-authorization.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-update-validation.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-update-audit.spec.ts passed with 6 tests; pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/integration/expenses-delete.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-restore.spec.ts test/integration/groups-assignment.spec.ts test/integration/scenario-group-expense.spec.ts test/integration/scenario-household-expense.spec.ts test/integration/groups-read.spec.ts passed with 22 tests; pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/unit/expense-query-helpers.spec.ts test/integration/expenses-detail-access.spec.ts passed with 9 tests.
Full worker verification passed: pnpm --filter worker test completed with 76 files and 366 tests passing.
Full repo verification passed: ./init.sh returned Done! after the expense contract and worker test migrations.
Latest gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all) returned LOW risk with 8 changed indexed symbols across 10 files and 0 affected processes.

notes: Execution has started. Phase 0 and Phase 1 are complete. Three Phase 3 milestones are complete: household settings cleanup, public expense contract migration, and worker expense-suite migration. Temporary storage bridges still exist, and broader schema/internal cleanup is still in progress.
